revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-125

Alternative term: Sector Screen (U.S.A.)

An opaque screen so placed as to provide a sharp cut-off to a beam in a sector light, and to reduce the angle of uncertainty (2-5-230).

[[Image:Ch2_Fig38.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: In French the term Cache is used when the device is located at the optic; and the term Ecran is used when the device is located at any other position, e.g. at the lantern or outside it.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Cut Screen (G.B.)}}
